444f44f9-6270-4e37-ab8a-0d1b19902a60.Text:
At the start of combat, the crime lord gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} stacks of the sure-fire plan effect. Activation of this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} consumes 1 stack and makes the next action stronger depending on the type of action:
-<indent=5%>If the crime lord attacks, they deal +{uip|AdditionalDamage|f8fbdb667b6a4dca814aec2bb5f14097}% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>If the crime lord moves, they gain +{uip|AdditionalDodge|f8fbdb667b6a4dca814aec2bb5f14097}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} until the start of their next turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>If the crime lord uses a non-damaging ability on an enemy, that enemy suffers a −{uip|AdditionalDamageTarget|f8fbdb667b6a4dca814aec2bb5f14097}% penalty to damage for one round.</indent>
Can be used multiple times per turn.

185ef885-5fd4-4cdb-a8d8-0f7529843e9b.Text: The {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} of sure-fire plan is increased by +{uip|DamageBonus|d29bd0cb21184342a09e7b928eaac0dc}%. Killing at least one enemy with the attack restores 1 stack of sure-fire plan. Passive Effect: The Crime Lord will gain +{uip|CritDamageBonus|d29bd0cb21184342a09e7b928eaac0dc}% critical damage. If attacking a target with less than 50% health, they will gain +{uip|ArmorPenetrationBonus|d29bd0cb21184342a09e7b928eaac0dc}% armour penetration and ignore {uip|DeflectionBonus|d29bd0cb21184342a09e7b928eaac0dc} deflection.

971cdb14-a027-415d-8f15-666bd6b14b68.Text: The {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} from sure-fire plan is increased by +{uip|AdditionalDodge|1badb7fcaefb458a947f78ead3795587}%. Dodging or parrying at least one attack by the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} restores 1 stack of sure-fire plan. Passive Effect: The Crime Lord will gain +{uip|PassiveDodge|1badb7fcaefb458a947f78ead3795587}% dodge and parry chance if their health is below 50%, and they can use {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} to calculate their dodge chance.

6a93bc3c-bc9c-4533-971a-126c87fe55b2.Text: An enemy affected by sure-fire plan also suffers a −{uip|DodgeParryReduction|885ee31fc7ac49b9b75abd270004635d}% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}. Passive Effect:The Crime Lord will apply {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 2 rounds on critical hits if their target fails a Willpower check with a −{uip|PerplexedPenalty|885ee31fc7ac49b9b75abd270004635d} penalty.

f83d8c0e-39ef-4b6d-ba1f-cb61fac0b4a6.Text: At the start of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, if the crime lord has no stacks of sure-fire plan, they gain +1 stack. Passive Effect:The Crime Lord will gain +20 {g|Encyclopedia:SkillAwareness}Awareness{/g} and reroll all failed skill and attribute checks.

5c64add2-1740-4827-b2b0-745d93d024b1.Text: Once per combat, if the crime lord has at least 1 stack of sure-fire plan, they do not die from lethal {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}. Instead, they heal (5 × sure-fire plan stacks)% of {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}, lose all stacks, and can no longer gain sure-fire plan stacks. Passive Effect:The Crime Lord gains +10 to all characteristics as long as they have at least 1 stack of sure-fire plan.
